title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a man giving information about a sports club open day.
audio_script: Man: Welcome to Greenhill Sports Club. I’m going to explain what will happen at our open day next week. The club is open every day, but the open day itself is on [14]Saturday[/14], because that’s when most of our coaches are free. You can try lots of activities, including basketball and swimming, but the most popular session is usually [15]tennis[/15]. Please book that one early if you want a place. For the climbing wall, you don’t need special shoes, but you must wear [16]gloves[/16]. We’ll lend you some if you don’t have your own. Lunch will be available in the [17]café[/17], which has just opened after repairs. There will be sandwiches, soup and fruit, but no hot meals this time. If you want to join the club after the open day, don’t complete the paper form. It’s quicker to use your [18]phone[/18] and join online while you’re here. New members pay only [19]six[/19] pounds for their first month, which is much cheaper than usual. Staff will be near the entrance all afternoon if you need help or directions. Families are welcome at the open day, and there will be simple games for younger children in the small sports hall. You do not need to be very fit to join; many of our members come only once a week. Lockers are available near the changing rooms, but bring a coin to use one. At three o’clock, one of our coaches will give a short talk about safe exercise for beginners.  If you decide to join, you can use the swimming pool on the same day without paying anything extra.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the open day is on Saturday.
The speaker says the most popular session is usually tennis.
The speaker says people must wear gloves for the climbing wall.
The speaker says lunch will be available in the café.
The speaker says it is quicker to use your phone and join online.
The speaker says new members pay six pounds for their first month.
